channel.title: Muraqabah Initiative: Research & Reflections
channel.description: Writing from Muraqabah Initiative: spirituality, hadith sciences, and impact reports.

item.title: What Is Muraqabah?
item.description: The vigilant awareness that Allah is always watching, and why our initiative carries this name.

item.title: Why Chains of Transmission Matter
item.description: The science of hadith transmission has no parallel in any other religious or historical tradition.

item.title: Knowledge in Action: The 2026 Ramadan Campaign
item.description: How our community raised $14,725.80 in two weeks and delivered over 300 family packages, 648 hot meals, and direct assistance at home and in Tarim, Yemen.
